title: Uruguayan Sirloin Steak with Horseradish Sauce
description: A flavorful Uruguayan-inspired dish featuring grilled sirloin steak served with a creamy horseradish sauce. Perfect for a dinner date or a special occasion.
instructions: Season the steaks with salt, pepper, and a pinch of paprika.
Grill the steaks for 4-5 minutes per side, or until they reach your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the steaks to a plate and let them rest for 5 minutes.
While the steaks are resting, mix the grated horseradish with softened butter to create the sauce.
Add Worcestershire sauce to the horseradish sauce, if using.
Serve the steaks hot with the horseradish sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with chopped parsley, if desired.
